title: RESOLUTION 2 — Mama's lesson lands
prompt: Medium shot in @dream-house. @Mama kneels in the CENTER on the rug, hands clasped, smiling warmly toward the rug. @Sara on the LEFT sits cross-legged on the rug holding one doll, looking up. @Eva on the RIGHT sits cross-legged on the rug holding a different doll, also looking up. Mama (warm, teaching, slow): "When we share with the people we love, the joy gets BIGGER, not smaller. That's the real magic of this Dream House." Warm golden afternoon light, locked camera.
